title: Undefined property error in Splitter node
symptom: When using the Splitter node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split')'. This happens when trying to split fields that are not properly defined.
not_this_if: All tables have the required fields defined
root_cause: The error occurs because one of the tables being processed does not contain the expected fields, leading to an undefined value when the Splitter node attempts to access them. This typically happens when merging or appending tables that have different structures.
fix_steps: Ensure all tables being appended have the same fields defined.
Consider merging the tables instead of appending them.
agent_instruction: Check the structure of the tables being processed and merge them if necessary.
